message:
fix(core,vdbe,vfs): correctness fixes for UPDATE SET, seek opcodes, and VFS I/O

connection.rs: fix UPDATE SET assignment by unwrapping single-element
RowValue to prevent spurious wrapper in eval_join_expr

engine.rs (VDBE): fix SeekGT opcode to loop past all equal-prefix keys
instead of single advance; fix SeekLE opcode similarly; switch from
decode_record to parse_record for direct byte parsing without Blob
wrapper allocation

memory.rs (VFS): remove unnecessary .clone() on ownership transfer

uring.rs (VFS): simplify io_uring read/write fallback — unconditional
disable on failure, deduplicate fallback recording

conformance tests: replace single-iteration for loops with plain blocks
for readability (45+ locations); add #[ignore] reason string

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
